name: 46_Speech_Recognition_DeepSpeech_LibriSpeech_DL
query: Ningependa kuendeleza mfumo wa utambuzi wa sauti kwa kutumia maktaba ya DeepSpeech na seti ya data ya LibriSpeech kwa ajili yangu. Je, unaweza kutekeleza upakiaji wa data na usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, katika `src/data_loader.py`? Rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi katika `src/train.py`. Tafadhali hifadhi matokeo ya utambuzi katika `results/recognition_results.txt`. Kisha, tengeneza michoro ya hatua za usindikaji wa sauti (kama mawimbi na spectrogram) na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya kina juu ya usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye, na uhifadhi kama `results/recognition_report.md`. Zaidi ya hayo, andika mchakato wa usanidi wa DeepSpeech, na vidokezo kwa masuala ya kawaida ya usakinishaji, ukitumia [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kama rejeleo. Hifadhi mfano wa mwisho katika `models/saved_models/`. Asante mapema!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.
Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.
Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa usakinishaji wa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri, na vidokezo vya utatuzi ikiwa maktaba itashindwa kusakinishwa. Rejelea [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kwa mwongozo.
Michoro inapaswa kuonyesha wazi hatua za usindikaji wa sauti, na kufanya iwe rahisi kufasiri athari za usindikaji wa awali.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha mapendekezo ya mifano mbadala au mbinu ikiwa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" itakuwa ngumu kutekeleza.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}`. It does not actually load the "LibriSpeech" dataset from any file or directory. The trajectory evidence further confirms this, showing that an attempt to run the file resulted in a `FileNotFoundError` for the path `/mnt/data/librispeech`, and no subsequent steps corrected this issue. Therefore, the requirement for the "LibriSpeech" dataset to be loaded in `src/data_loader.py` is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual audio preprocessing, noise reduction, or normalization logic. The trajectory evidence further indicates a `RuntimeError` due to varying audio lengths during training data loading, which demonstrates a failure in the initial audio preprocessing or length normalization step that should occur within the data loader. Therefore, the requirement for audio preprocessing in `src/data_loader.py` is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the provided `src/train.py` file does not contain any hyperparameter tuning for learning rate or batch size. The code shows a minimal semantic implementation with a simple training loop that does not define, adjust, or tune these hyperparameters. The environment feedback indicates the script executed without errors, but this does not demonstrate that hyperparameters were tuned within the file as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement to store the speech recognition model in `models/saved_models/` is not satisfied. The provided code files (`data_loader.py` and `train.py`) are minimal semantic implementations that only create placeholder functions and generate text files in the `results/` directory. They do not contain any code to train, save, or store a speech recognition model file (e.g., `.h5`, `.pth`, or any other model format) into the `models/saved_models/` folder. The trajectory evidence mentions a `cp` operation copying a `speech_recognition_model.h5` file, but this operation is not reflected in the actual project code provided for evaluation. The code does not demonstrate the creation or saving of a model to the required location.

<UNSATISFIED>
The file `results/recognition_results.txt` exists, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is not a valid or meaningful speech recognition result. It appears to be a placeholder or an empty/incomplete output, not the actual saved recognition results.

judge_stats.criteria: Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement for generating and saving audio processing charts as `results/figures/audio_visualization.png` is not satisfied. The key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file: "No endpoints found that support image input", which indicates the file either does not exist in the expected format/location or cannot be accessed. While the trajectory evidence mentions successful generation and archiving in steps 7 and 9, the current workspace evidence directly contradicts this by failing to retrieve the specified file.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is for a report containing recognition accuracy, error analysis, and improvement recommendations to be created and saved as `results/recognition_report.md`. The provided key evidence shows the content of this file is `('placeholder', None)`, which indicates the file exists but contains only placeholder or null content, not the substantive analysis required. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was created and saved without errors, but does not provide evidence that the required analytical content was written into the file. Therefore, the requirement for a completed report is not satisfied.
